schedules_text:
Gate A at (8,3): open exactly when (t mod 6) is in {3, 4, 5}. So it is open at t=3,4,5,9,10,11,... and closed at t=0,1,2,6,7,8,... You can only step ONTO it at a tick t+1 where it is open.
Guard P: walks a fixed cycle of length 6. Its position at tick t is determined by (t mod 6) as follows: t mod 6=0: (5,2); t mod 6=1: (4,2); t mod 6=2: (3,2); t mod 6=3: (3,1); t mod 6=4: (3,2); t mod 6=5: (4,2). This repeats forever.
Guard Q: walks a fixed cycle of length 8. Its position at tick t is determined by (t mod 8) as follows: t mod 8=0: (6,1); t mod 8=1: (7,1); t mod 8=2: (8,1); t mod 8=3: (8,2); t mod 8=4: (7,2); t mod 8=5: (8,2); t mod 8=6: (8,1); t mod 8=7: (7,1). This repeats forever.
parcels_text:
Parcel 1: pick it up at (1,4) (map glyph '1'), deliver it to (6,1) (map glyph 'x'). Pickup and delivery happen automatically when you end a tick on the cell.
Parcel 2: pick it up at (4,8) (map glyph '2'), deliver it to (5,1) (map glyph 'y'). Pickup and delivery happen automatically when you end a tick on the cell.
